scope.statement: A byte-pinned snapshot of the public NiceChunk production entry, runtime bundle, and runtime-resolved chain-module candidates.
scope.retainedInstead: Full response SHA-256/length/status metadata plus byte offsets and hashed short literal contexts.
scope.dateSemantics: auditDate names the documentation audit batch and output filename; snapshotDate is the real UTC date of the HTTPS observation.

privacyAndNetworkBoundary.note: Static JavaScript contains storage-key and secretKey field names; this capture reads code bytes only and never reads any player's stored values.

playMainJsProbe.interpretation: The probed /play/main.js URL returned the same HTML bytes as /play/index.html; it is an Nginx-style route fallback response, not JavaScript loaded by this index.

playChainAdapterJsProbe.interpretation: The probed repository-style adapter URL also returned the index HTML bytes, not adapter JavaScript.

moduleResolution.productionHostnameBranch: Non-localhost uses the build-version-derived production candidate.
chainCandidatePriority: valid manifest-discovered chain entry URLs, /dist/.vite/manifest.json before /.vite/manifest.json
moduleResolution.overrideCaptureBoundary: The two browser-specific overrides are evidenced as precedence rules in runtime bytes; this static capture did not read or set either override.
moduleResolution.chainImportFallback: Candidates are imported in order; import failures and modules missing accepted chain exports are skipped; exhaustion throws an error listing failures.

manifestProbes.outcome: Skipped because the 200 response is HTML, not a JSON manifest.

unversionedBulkProbe.boundary: This URL is retained as a source/deployment boundary probe; with a non-empty build version, runtime bytes select the versioned dedicated URL instead.

bulkCandidatePriority: then every chain-module candidate in chainCandidatePriority order
moduleResolution.bulkImportRequirement: A candidate is accepted only when recordBulkMineOnChain is a function; missing exports and import failures fall through.

fundingLookupOrder: then 100000000-lamport minimum when the selected value is non-finite or below minimum
sessionClientObservations.evidenceBoundary: These are production client serialization/storage defaults. This snapshot does not claim that every stored field is enforced by consumer programs.

backpackUnifiedGameTarget.evidenceBoundary: The target and namespace are values retained in the fetched chain asset; no instruction was constructed or sent.

bulkMining.defaultStaticCandidateFinding: At capture time the dedicated versioned candidate was 404, while both fetched chain candidates had identical bytes and no recordBulkMineOnChain export name. No default fetched candidate supplied a byte-verifiable bulk-mining tag path. The separately probed unversioned bulk URL was also 404 but is not selected by this versioned runtime.
bulkMining.overrideBoundary: A page-specific global or localStorage chain override could change candidate bytes; no override was read, set, or exercised by this capture.

resources.hashBoundary: sha256 covers the decoded HTTP entity body bytes in [0, bodyLength); Accept-Encoding was identity.

validates: short literal bytes, offsets, context hashes, and source-hash bindings
offlineCheck.limitation: Because full response bodies are intentionally not retained, --check validates the pinned capture and embedded literal evidence; recapturing the remote bytes requires capture mode.
